name: jacob-todos
description: Manage Jacob's personal to-do system, built on Google Calendar + an HTML check-in surface with tasks_v3.json as the single source of truth. Triggers on consolidation, ranking, adding or merging tasks, the morning check-in, suggested-plan generation, and the scheduled todo-check-in routine. v0.2 bundles the full system (scripts + instruction docs + sanitized JSON templates) so a fresh install can scaffold `<workspace>/to do/` end-to-end.
